name: b2b-coffee-wholesale
description: B2B Coffee Wholesale Portal — Microservices + Event-Driven Architecture

scripts.dev:services: concurrently "pnpm --filter api-gateway dev" "pnpm --filter user-service dev" "pnpm --filter rfq-service dev" "pnpm --filter order-service dev" "pnpm --filter chat-service dev" "pnpm --filter notification-service dev" "pnpm --filter ai-service dev"
scripts.start:backend: concurrently "PORT=4001 pnpm --filter user-service start" "PORT=4002 pnpm --filter rfq-service start" "PORT=4003 pnpm --filter order-service start" "PORT=4004 pnpm --filter chat-service start" "PORT=4005 pnpm --filter notification-service start" "PORT=4006 pnpm --filter ai-service start" "pnpm --filter api-gateway start"
